runs.explanation: The expiration check on line 77 uses a strict inequality (`>`) instead of `>=``, causing an entry to be incorrectly considered valid at its exact moment of expiration. A secondary fault on line 74 uses the clock-skew-adjusted expiry time for the max-age check, which can result in erroneous log warnings.
